hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE "^src/main/java/.*\.java$" && printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Backend Java is staged. Enforced hex rules: run the hex-architecture-checker agent on this diff and confirm it is clean (decisions in the domain — not service/controller/frontend; the domain owns port calls; services never call use cases; a side-effect is NOT a use case, trigger it via a driven port; thin controllers) before committing. See the hexagonal-architecture skill.\"}}" || true
